title: Take a Photo, Edit Automatically! Adobe Launches a New AI Camera Tool, Opening the New Era of Intelligent Photo Editing with One Click
excerpt: Adobe has recently made a major update to its experimental camera app, Project Indigo, officially launching the new version 1.1. The biggest highlight of this u
content_html:
Adobe has recently made a major update to its experimental camera app, Project Indigo, officially launching the new version 1.1. The biggest highlight of this update is the introduction of a new editing module powered by generative AI, significantly enhancing the mobile photography experience.

Intelligent Photo Editing Features Introduced

In the new AI Playground section, users can easily remove unwanted objects or adjust lighting with just a tap. The system can quickly produce shallow depth-of-field effects comparable to those of a DSLR camera, and it can also intelligently analyze images to provide shooting and editing suggestions.

The software also supports custom editing modes, allowing users to save their preferred prompts for future reuse. Although these editing features are powerful, the software is still essentially a camera, aiming to explore the possibility of performing simple edits directly at the time of shooting.

Technical Support and Privacy Protection

This feature is currently supported by Google's Nano Banana model at the underlying level, and more models may be introduced in the future to run in parallel. Currently, the feature is only available for a small number of users for free testing, and Adobe will decide whether to make it a paid service based on market feedback.

Regarding privacy and security, the official team has promised not to upload users' prompts or images to the server, nor use them for model training. It is worth noting that this feature currently only supports photos taken with the app, and imported external images are temporarily not supported.

content_html_zh:
Adobe 近期对其实验性相机应用 Project Indigo 进行了重大更新，正式推出新版本 1.1。 本次更新的最大亮点是引入了基于生成式AI的全新编辑模块，显着增强了移动摄影体验。

推出智能照片编辑功能

在新的AI Playground部分，用户只需轻按一下即可轻松删除不需要的物体或调整灯光。 该系统可以快速产生堪比单反相机的浅景深效果，还可以智能分析图像以提供拍摄和编辑建议。

该软件还支持自定义编辑模式，允许用户保存他们喜欢的提示以供将来重复使用。 虽然这些编辑功能很强大，但该软件本质上仍然是一台相机，旨在探索在拍摄时直接进行简单编辑的可能性。

技术支持和隐私保护

该功能目前底层由 Google 的 Nano Banana 模型支持，未来可能会引入更多模型并行运行。 目前，该功能仅面向少数用户免费测试，Adobe将根据市场反馈决定是否将其设为付费服务。

关于隐私和安全，官方团队承诺不会将用户的提示或图像上传到服务器，也不会将其用于模型训练。 值得注意的是，该功能目前仅支持使用应用拍摄的照片，暂时不支持导入外部图片。
